title: Cleaner & Van Driver
description:
Job Overview - Cleaner & Van Driver

Supreme Cleaners is seeking a reliable Cleaner & Van Driver to join our team. This role involves primarily residential cleaning services, as well as driving and maintaining the company van to ensure cleaning equipment and tools are safely transported to and from job sites.

The ideal candidate is responsible, punctual, and professional, with a positive work attitude and respect for clients’ homes and company property.

Key Responsibilities

Cleaning Duties

  • Perform residential cleaning services (e.g. general cleaning, deep cleaning, move-in/out cleaning)
  • Handle cleaning equipment and machines carefully and professionally
  • Ensure cleaning quality meets company standards before job completion

Driving & Logistics

  • Drive company van to and from job locations
  • Ensure cleaning machines, tools, and supplies are securely loaded, transported, and unloaded
  • Plan routes efficiently and arrive on time for scheduled jobs

Van & Equipment Care

  • Keep the company van clean, tidy, and well-maintained
  • Carry out basic daily checks (cleanliness, equipment condition)
  • Report any vehicle or equipment issues promptly

Requirements

  • Singapore Citizen or Singapore PR only
  • Valid Singapore driving licence
  • Comfortable with physical work
  • Responsible, punctual, and trustworthy
  • Good attitude, kind character, and respectful behaviour
  • Able to work independently and as part of a team
  • Experience in cleaning or driving is an advantage, but training will be provided

Working Conditions & Benefits

  • 1 day off per week
  • Salary range: S$1,700 – S$2,000 per month (based on experience)
  • Stable working environment
  • Supportive team and structured work schedule
  • Opportunity to grow with the company

postedCompany.description:
Supreme Cleaners, we bring care and cleanliness to every job, offering reliable and affordable cleaning services tailored to your needs. Your spotless space is our mission!


With years of experience, we’ve built a reputation for professionalism, attention to detail, and customer satisfaction. Whether you need post-renovation cleaning, move-in/move-out cleaning, or regular maintenance cleaning, our team is equipped to handle it all. We understand that every space is unique, which is why we customize our services to meet your specific requirements. From removing stubborn stains to sanitizing high-touch areas, we go above and beyond to ensure your space is clean, healthy, and inviting.


Our Vision
At Supreme Cleaners, we envision a world where every space—homes, offices, or commercial properties—radiates cleanliness, comfort, and care. We aim to be the trusted partner that transforms cluttered or post-renovation spaces into pristine environments where people can thrive and feel at ease.


Our Mission
Our mission is to bring care and cleanliness to every job. We believe a clean space is essential for health, productivity, and peace of mind. That’s why we deliver exceptional cleaning services, ensuring every corner is meticulously cared for without cutting corners.
postedCompany.name: SUPREME CLEANERS PRIVATE LIMITED
